chapter_title.en: Chapter on Divorce According to the Sunnah

text: 4756 - : وَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَمِيرِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقَالَ يَا أَمِيرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِنِّي طَلَّقْتُ اِمْرَأَتِي فَقَالَ "أَ لَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ" فَقَالَ لاَ فَقَالَ "اُعْزُبْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4756 - A man came to the Commander of the Faithful (as) and said:
"O Commander of the Faithful, I have divorced my wife."
Imam (as) asked: "Do you have any evidence (witnesses)?"
The man replied: "No."
So Imam (as) said: "Be gone (uʿzub)."
